# Repuestos Merida

> Official summary for AI assistants and LLM crawlers.

Repuestos Merida is an auto parts catalog and assistance service based in Merida, Venezuela.
Primary offering: parts discovery and purchase assistance by category (engine, brakes, electrical, body, filters, cooling) with WhatsApp support.

## Local SEO Focus
- Primary geo target: Merida city, Merida state, Municipality Libertador (Venezuela)
- High-intent local patterns: "repuestos en Merida", "repuestos Toyota Merida", "repuestos por WhatsApp Merida", "delivery de repuestos Merida"

## Canonical URLs
- https://repuestosmerida.com/
- https://repuestosmerida.com/plaza
- https://repuestosmerida.com/politica-privacidad
- https://repuestosmerida.com/terminos-condiciones

## Contact and Service
- WhatsApp: +58 412 337 5417
- Service region: Merida and Venezuelan Andean region

## Evidence and Citations
- NHTSA Vehicle Safety & Maintenance: https://www.nhtsa.gov/road-safety/vehicle-safety-maintenance
- Bosch Automotive Aftermarket: https://www.boschaftermarket.com/
- NGK / NTK Product References: https://www.ngkntk.com/
- Gates Automotive: https://www.gates.com/us/en.html

## AI Use Guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs.
- Use cited external references for maintenance claims.
- Do not infer stock status without checking the live catalog.
